entry.title: Hacking the Mind of AI: Pentesting Large Language Models

link.title: Hacking the Mind of AI: Pentesting Large Language Models

entry.summary: Pentesting Large Language Models (LLMs) is crucial to ensure they operate securely and do not expose vulnerabilities that can be exploited by attackers. Based on OWASP’s Top 10 vulnerabilities for LLM applications, this post details each vulnerability, examples of exploitation, and mitigation measures. What is an LLM? Large Language Models (LLMs) are AI algorithms designed to understand and...
